passives.name: Craftsman
passives.description: Increases your experience gain with the Heavy Armor skill line by 15%. Increases your crafting inspiration gained by 10%.

passives.name: Unflinching Rage
passives.description: Increases your Max Health by 1000. When you deal damage, you heal for 2125 Health. This can occur once every 4 seconds.

passives.name: Swift Warrior
passives.description: Increases your Weapon and Spell Damage by 258. Reduces the cost of Sprint by 12% and increases the Movement Speed bonus of Sprint by 10%.
